bird.summary: The East Brazilian chachalaca (Ortalis araucuan) is a species of bird in the family Cracidae, the chachalacas, guans, and curassows. It is…

locations.name: 北里奥格兰德州
locations.summary: 北里奥格兰德州（葡萄牙語：Rio Grande do Norte）或称北大河州，是巴西的一個州，位於巴西東北部的海岸，共拥有167个城市，面积52,796.791 km²，人口300多万人，其中73%聚集在市区，州府纳塔尔，意为圣诞节，為…

locations.name: 米纳斯吉拉斯州
locations.summary: 米纳斯吉拉斯州（葡萄牙語：Minas Gerais，[ˈminɐz ʒeˈɾajs] ；直译：「一般〔普通〕的矿山」）是巴西东南部一个州，人口约两千万。是巴西第二人口大州，国内生产总值也排名全国第三。该州以山、瀑布、历史名城、宝石，以及盛…

relations.subject: East Brazilian chachalaca
relations.evidence: The East Brazilian chachalaca is found in a fairly narrow strip of far eastern Brazil, from Rio Grande do Norte south into Espírito Santo and Minas Gerais

relations.subject: East Brazilian chachalaca

relations.subject: East Brazilian chachalaca
relations.evidence: It appears to tolerate human activity and human-altered habitat but does face some pressure from habitat destruction and hunting
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: East Brazilian chachalaca

relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
